text:
Scope is satisfied.

**Roadmap fit.** The UniversalCovers `README.md` (lines 49–88) names exactly this material as the missing-and-to-be-ported foundation: Stage 0.1 (discreteness of homotopy-class fibres, from #31576) and Stage 0.2 (`BasedPath x₀` and the path-component machinery of `endpoint ⁻¹' U`, from #38292), under `[…][SemilocallySimplyConnectedSpace X]`. The PR delivers precisely these: `SemilocallySimplyConnected.lean` (the SLSC typeclass plus `Path.Homotopic.Quotient.instDiscreteTopology`) and `BasedPath.lean` (the based-path space and `isOpen_pathComponent_preimage` / `pathComponent_preimage_saturated`). Direct, proximate path to a named target — not speculative. The `UniversalCoverPrelude` vendors only pending-Mathlib API both files consume. Description states the path explicitly.

**Single topic.** The three files are a linear dependency stack (Prelude ← SemilocallySimplyConnected ← BasedPath), all Stage-0 foundations aimed at the one universal-cover construction; the SLSC typeclass is itself consumed by `BasedPath`'s main results. This is coherent prerequisite infrastructure as one unit, not unrelated targets or an opportunistic refactor bundled with new work.

No scope findings.

TAUCETI-VERDICT-cb203d2a06625de520e3f825

```json
  "verdict": "approve",
  "summary": "Ports Stage 0.1 (SLSC typeclass + discreteness of homotopy-class fibres, #31576) and Stage 0.2 (based-path space + endpoint-preimage path components, #38292) named in the UniversalCovers roadmap, plus a prelude vendoring pending-Mathlib API. The three files form a single prerequisite dependency stack toward the one universal-cover target.",
  "findings": []
}
```

verdict_obj.summary: Ports Stage 0.1 (SLSC typeclass + discreteness of homotopy-class fibres, #31576) and Stage 0.2 (based-path space + endpoint-preimage path components, #38292) named in the UniversalCovers roadmap, plus a prelude vendoring pending-Mathlib API. The three files form a single prerequisite dependency stack toward the one universal-cover target.
